org.jscience.social.politics

    Method
    Description
    static ApportionmentMethods.ApportionmentResult
    ApportionmentMethods.dHondt(List<ApportionmentMethods.Party> parties, int totalSeats)
    D'Hondt method - tends to favor larger parties.
    static ApportionmentMethods.ApportionmentResult
    ApportionmentMethods.hamilton(List<ApportionmentMethods.Party> parties, int totalSeats)
    Hamilton (Largest Remainder) method with Hare quota.
    static ApportionmentMethods.ApportionmentResult
    ApportionmentMethods.huntingtonHill(List<ApportionmentMethods.Party> parties, int totalSeats, int minimumPerParty)
    Huntington-Hill method, used for the US House of Representatives.
    static ApportionmentMethods.ApportionmentResult
    ApportionmentMethods.sainteLague(List<ApportionmentMethods.Party> parties, int totalSeats)
    Sainte-LaguÃ« method - generally considered more proportional than D'Hondt.
